hero.desc2: Build a deck. Enter the arena. Prove your supremacy.

assault.label: ASSAULT
assault.name: Assault
assault.desc: Power and aggression. Crush the enemy before they can respond.

precision.label: PRECISION
precision.name: Precision
precision.desc: Control and calculation. Every move is a surgically precise strike.

arcane.label: ARCANE
arcane.name: Arcane
arcane.desc: Dark magic. Manipulate the board and fates from the shadows.

step1.title: REGISTER
step1.desc: Create an account and get a starter deck for each faction

step2.title: BUILD A DECK
step2.desc: Use the Deck Builder to create the perfect 20-card deck

step3.title: FIND MATCH
step3.desc: Enter the lobby and find an opponent in Normal or Ranked mode

step4.title: WIN
step4.desc: Play cards, manage mana, and crush your opponent
